name: money-os
description: Your AI financial consciousness — a 24/7 wealth-building co-pilot embedded in your AI assistant. 16 skills across 5 layers: cash flow intelligence with Freedom Impact scoring, weekly financial pulse narratives, Freedom Number calculation with Monte Carlo simulation, wealth leak scanning ($2K-8K/year in fixable leaks), portfolio health checks, tax-aware rebalancing, tax-loss harvesting, macro radar, year-round tax strategy, tax return analysis, thesis-to-trade conversion, decision modeling with probability-weighted scenarios, life event financial playbooks, generational wealth planning, adaptive financial education, and a courage engine for when money feels overwhelming. Not a budgeting app — a wealth creation system.
